headline: Why The Equity Residential (EQR) Story Is Shifting As Price Targets Converge In The Low US$70s
summary: Equity Residential’s fair value target has shifted slightly, moving from US$69.88 to US$70.58 and keeping the stock’s modeled value in a narrow band around the low US$70s. That small adjustment matches what you are seeing in recent analyst commentary, where a mix of higher and trimmed targets clusters around similar levels and reflects both cautious and optimistic views. Read on to see how to interpret these changing targets and keep track of the evolving story. Stay updated as the Fair Value...
